barRaise.topFinding: The six-day stall finally broke: the release ran (HEAD moved to v0.34.1), the truncation window closed, the Decision-27 slot collision was renumbered to 29, the launch-checklist anchor advanced to 0.33.1, and the 0.34.2 code audit auto-applied real worker fixes. But the cheap, AI-fixable HIGH flagged six straight reviews still has not landed: scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1 is still not merge-aware, and the 05-31 release executed the predicted erasure, so the live YaC.json reads barRaise:null and findings 0/0/0. Combined with the still-unwired pin-completeness gate (99.8% of sampled courses missing per-hole basket coords, no N6 launch gate), that is two HIGH findings, so the verdict de-escalates from stalled to at-risk. Trajectory is up; fix the dashboard writer before the next release and the dashboard will finally tell the truth.
